Spec T2 New Module

10. Modules

One module name is genuinely new (absent from the real repo's plugins/pmos-toolkit/skills/ tree).

namedepsrole
architecture (none) Existing skill — already lives at plugins/pmos-toolkit/skills/architecture.
spec architecture Existing skill — already lives at plugins/pmos-toolkit/skills/spec.
brandnewthing architecture Brand-new module not present in the repo; auto-upgrade should detect it.

11. Architectural assertions

  • The new module brandnewthing must not depend on anything outside the declared deps — the boundary needs to stay narrow so the auto-upgrade isn't followed by surprise coupling later.
